creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
This PR supersedes PR ports/31889, about a vulnerability.
	Version 2.2.7 add support for simplified chinese.
	It supersedes PR ports/31090 (change default IMAP server),
	there are some minor updates, and it prepares the migration
	towards IMP v. 3.

How-To-Repeat: 	Apply the enclosed shar.
